summary: Completed frontend regression testing for refactored TechnicalReports.jsx modals. All 4 extracted modal components (TecnicoModal, EquipamentoModal, MaterialModal, AssinaturaModal) are working correctly in both Add and Edit modes.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

tests: Modal opens when clicking 'Adicionar Registo Manual' button
Title shows 'Adicionar Técnico' with green plus icon
Nome do Técnico dropdown populated with system users
Data do Trabalho date picker works correctly
Código automatically calculated based on date (1=Diurno, 2=Noturno, S=Sábado, D=Domingo/Feriado)
Tempo no Cliente (minutos) field with hours/minutes display
Km (só ida) field with note about multiplication by 2
Hora de Início/Fim optional fields for Folha de Horas
Tipo de Horário dropdown with 4 options
Cancelar and Adicionar Técnico buttons work correctly
Modal opens when clicking edit button on technician record
Title shows 'Editar Técnico' with blue edit icon
All fields pre-filled with existing data (tecnico_nome, data_trabalho, minutos_cliente, kms_deslocacao, hora_inicio, hora_fim, tipo_horario)
Atualizar Técnico button (blue) instead of Adicionar
Modal opens when clicking 'Adicionar Equipamento' button
Title shows 'Adicionar Equipamento' with green plus icon
Dropdown to select existing equipment or create new
Options: 'Criar novo equipamento (guardar na BD do cliente)', 'Adicionar apenas à OT (sem guardar na BD)', existing client equipment
Green note when creating new: 'O equipamento será guardado na base de dados do cliente'
Orange note when adding only to OT: 'O equipamento será associado apenas a esta OT'
Fields: Tipologia, Marca, Modelo, Número de Série, Ano de Fabrico
Fields disabled when selecting existing equipment
Cancelar and Adicionar Equipamento buttons work correctly
Modal opens when clicking edit button on equipment
Title shows 'Editar Equipamento (Principal)' with blue edit icon for main equipment
All fields pre-filled with existing data (tipologia, marca, modelo, numero_serie, ano_fabrico)
Guardar Alterações button (green) instead of Adicionar
Modal opens when clicking 'Adicionar Material' button
Title shows 'Adicionar Material' with green plus icon
Descrição do Material field with placeholder 'Ex: Parafuso M8×20'
Quantidade field with default value 1
Fornecido Por dropdown with options: Cliente, HWI, Cotação
Yellow info box when 'Cotação' selected: 'Um Pedido de Cotação será criado automaticamente para este material'
Cancelar and Adicionar buttons work correctly
Modal opens when clicking edit button on material item
Title shows 'Editar Material' with blue edit icon
All fields pre-filled with existing data (descricao, quantidade, fornecido_por)
Yellow info box shown when fornecido_por is 'Cotação'
Guardar button (blue) instead of Adicionar
Modal opens when clicking 'Nova Assinatura' button
Title shows 'Assinaturas - OT #355' with pen icon
Existing signatures displayed with name, date, and signature image
Edit date button (pencil icon) for existing signatures
Delete button (trash icon) for existing signatures
Add new signature section with Primeiro Nome and Último Nome fields
Data da Intervenção date picker
Tabs: 'Assinatura Digital' and 'Apenas Nome'
Signature canvas for digital signature drawing
Limpar button to clear canvas
Guardar Assinatura Digital button (blue)
Guardar Assinatura Manual button (green) in 'Apenas Nome' tab
OTs page accessible via floating button on dashboard
Ordens de Trabalho tab shows list of OTs
Clicking on OT card opens detailed modal

Modal sections: Dados do Cliente, Mão de Obra/Deslocação, Cronómetros, Registos de Mão de Obra, Equipamentos, Intervenções/Assistências, Componentes Adicionais (Photos), Material, Pedidos de Cotação, Assinaturas do Cliente
All Add/Edit buttons in modal trigger correct extracted components

critical_code_review_comments: TechnicalReports.jsx is still ~6200 lines - consider further refactoring in future iterations
All DialogContent components missing aria-describedby for accessibility - minor improvement
seed_data_creation: Used existing OT #355 with technicians, equipment, materials, and signatures for testing

verified_modals.add_mode: Working - Opens with 'Adicionar Técnico' title, all fields functional
verified_modals.edit_mode: Working - Opens with 'Editar Técnico' title, pre-fills all data

verified_modals.add_mode: Working - Opens with dropdown selection, create new or select existing
verified_modals.edit_mode: Working - Opens with 'Editar Equipamento (Principal)' title, pre-fills all data

verified_modals.add_mode: Working - Opens with 'Adicionar Material' title, Cotação info box shows correctly
verified_modals.edit_mode: Working - Opens with 'Editar Material' title, pre-fills all data

verified_modals.features: Working - Shows existing signatures, add new with digital canvas or manual name, edit date, delete

context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactored modal components (TecnicoModal, EquipamentoModal, MaterialModal, AssinaturaModal) extracted from TechnicalReports.jsx are fully functional. All modals open/close correctly, form fields work, and data submission to backend is integrated. The main TechnicalReports.jsx component imports these from /app/frontend/src/components/technical-reports/index.js. Navigation to OTs: Dashboard -> floating blue button (bottom right) -> 'Ordens de Trabalho' tab -> click on OT card.
